full_description: Focus Mode is an app designed to help you stay focused and avoid distractions. It provides a simple and customizable way to block distracting websites and apps, allowing you to concentrate on your work, study, or other important tasks. With Focus Mode, you can create a personalized blocklist of websites and apps that distract you the most, and set a schedule for when you want to block them. You can also customize the app's settings to fit your needs, such as setting a password to prevent yourself from turning off the blocklist. Additionally, Focus Mode provides statistics on how much time you've spent on distracting websites and apps, helping you identify areas where you can improve your productivity. By using Focus Mode, you can train yourself to stay focused, avoid procrastination, and achieve your goals more efficiently.
